title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Zostel - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Zostel - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Zostel invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Zostel:
Zostel is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zostel!
